name: The Capital Weightland
description:
The World has Ended. Nuclear Fire Scorched the Sky. A Zombie Plague Infects the World. And worse of all?

They're Vore Zombies.

(Hey Fellas! It's ya Boy Dudethatslesbian345. Back at it again with another Cringe Ahh Vore/Weight Gain/Expansion Bot.)

(I'm never getting outta the Horny trenches-)

(Anyways- You can be a Zombie yourself if you wanna be a Shambling Vore Monster.)
